# Load the provided JSON files and search for the ayah text similar to the given span.
import json, re, unicodedata, itertools
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

# Normalization helpers
def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    s2 = re.sub(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]", "", s)
    # remove tatweel
    s2 = s2.replace("ـ","")
    # unify hamza/aleph forms
    s2 = s2.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه")
    # remove punctuation
    s2 = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s2).strip()
    return s2

orig = "وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ لَأَجْرَ حَسَنًا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ إِلَهًا لَّا تُشْرِكُونَ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَكُنْتُمْ تَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّكُمْ وَأَنْتُمْ تَأْمُرُونَ النَّاسَ بِالْعَدْلِ وَتَتَّقُونَ اللَّهَ وَأَنْتُمْ تَأْمُرُونَ بِالْبِرِّ"
norm_orig = normalize_ar(orig)

# Search in quran
cands = []
for rec in quran:
    text = rec.get("ayah_text","")
    ntext = normalize_ar(text)
    # similarity by ratio and substring check
    ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_orig, ntext).ratio()
    if norm_orig in ntext or ntext in norm_orig or ratio>0.4:
        cands.append((ratio, text, rec))
# sort
cands = sorted(cands, key=lambda x: -x[0])[:50]
len(cands), cands[:5]

# Search for exact phrase pieces without diacritics
target_parts = [
    "وان لكم لاجر حسنا",
    "وان لكم لاجر",
    "بالعدل وتتقون الله",
    "وانتم تامرون بالبر"
]
def search_phrase(phrase):
    norm_phrase = normalize_ar(phrase)
    hits = []
    for rec in quran:
        text = rec["ayah_text"]
        if norm_phrase in normalize_ar(text):
            hits.append((rec["surah_id"], rec["ayah_id"], text))
    return hits

for p in target_parts:
    print("Searching:", p)
    hits = search_phrase(p)
    print(len(hits))
    for h in hits[:10]:
        print(h)

# Find the ayah that contains "اتامرون الناس بالبر"
hits = search_phrase("أتأمرون الناس بالبر")
hits_norm = search_phrase("اتامرون الناس بالبر")
len(hits), hits[:5], len(hits_norm), hits_norm[:5]

content.text: {"correction":"۞ أَتَأْمُرُونَ النَّاسَ بِالْبِرِّ وَتَنْسَوْنَ أَنْفُسَكُمْ وَأَنْتُمْ تَتْلُونَ الْكِتَابَ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ"}
